text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
...Every time I come to watch her,<n>she's training
like there's no<n>tomorrow. All of them, really—you
can<n>tell how eager they are to shine.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I'm fortunate to have met such hard<n>workers...
truly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A smile spreads across Light Hello's<n>face as she
watches<n><chrname> train.
